title: Geeta Gandbhir: Filmmaker nominated for Oscars for two different films
description: Getting nominated once for an Academy Award is a feat but Geeta Gandbhir is nominated twice this year - for two separate films.
content:

title: Is Dubai's glossy image under threat? Not everyone thinks so

title: We're not profiteering on fuel. But my staff still face abuse
description: Independent retailer Goran Raven says the higher oil price is "horrific" for him as well as his customers.
content:
